heading: Dedicated Clusters for Low-Traffic Applications
body:
`M10` and `M20` cluster tiers support development environments
and production environments with low-traffic applications.

These clusters support replica set deployments only, but otherwise
provide full access to Atlas features.

> **Note:** `M10` and `M20` cluster tiers run on a [burstable performance](system-cpu) infrastructure. Clusters under heavy load may experience CPU throttling.
